description: Plugin-distributed hooks for insurance-life-health-benefits. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable benefits anti-patterns (a recommendation worded as legal/tax/actuarial advice with no sign-off; an HDHP with no HSA contribution; a quoted ACA/MLR/5500 figure with no [verify-at-build] marker). Set BENEFITS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
